CustomField.description: Marker for B13 migration records. TRUE means this Opportunity was generated by FscGoalMigrate from a legacy FinServ__FinancialGoal__c that classified as a sales-pipeline record (revenue diversification, customer acquisition, etc.).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-managed by FscGoalMigrate. TRUE means this is generated demo data; do not edit.
CustomField.label: Is Seeded Migration
